testcase.name: EDINET.EC8036W
testcase.description: EDINET.EC8036W: The consolidated business indicators, etc. have not been detailed tagged.

variation.name: invalid01
variation.description: WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI is true, but the presentation link for role rol_BusinessResultsOfGroup was relocated to a custom role so the rol_BusinessResultsOfGroup presentation network is empty (no detailed tagging in that role).
